channel.title: CHAPTER TEST — Bookmarks Digest
channel.description: 8 numbered chapter-encoding experiments. Tell me which TEST NN shows clickable chapters in Overcast.
channel.itunes:author: Chapter Test

item.title: TEST 01 — CONTROL: concat -c copy + ID3v2.3 + links (current broken method)
item.description: CONTROL: concat -c copy + ID3v2.3 + links (current broken method). 3 chapters at 0:00 / 0:30 / 1:00.

item.title: TEST 02 — clean re-encode + ID3v2.3, NO link frames
item.description: clean re-encode + ID3v2.3, NO link frames. 3 chapters at 0:00 / 0:30 / 1:00.

item.title: TEST 03 — clean re-encode + ID3v2.3 + links
item.description: clean re-encode + ID3v2.3 + links. 3 chapters at 0:00 / 0:30 / 1:00.

item.title: TEST 04 — clean re-encode + ID3v2.4 + links
item.description: clean re-encode + ID3v2.4 + links. 3 chapters at 0:00 / 0:30 / 1:00.

item.title: TEST 05 — clean re-encode + ID3v2.3 + links, NO CTOC table
item.description: clean re-encode + ID3v2.3 + links, NO CTOC table. 3 chapters at 0:00 / 0:30 / 1:00.

item.title: TEST 06 — clean re-encode + ffmpeg-written chapters (not mutagen)
item.description: clean re-encode + ffmpeg-written chapters (not mutagen). 3 chapters at 0:00 / 0:30 / 1:00.

item.title: TEST 07 — clean re-encode, NO embedded — podcast:chapters JSON only
item.description: clean re-encode, NO embedded — podcast:chapters JSON only. 3 chapters at 0:00 / 0:30 / 1:00.

item.title: TEST 08 — M4A/AAC + ffmpeg chapters (different container)
item.description: M4A/AAC + ffmpeg chapters (different container). 3 chapters at 0:00 / 0:30 / 1:00.
